title: aquilegia formosa var. caelifax
intro: Aquilegia formosa var. caelifax, also known as the Rocky Mountain columbine, is a perennial flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of North America. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, its roots and flowers possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, making it a valued remedy in traditional folk medicine. The plant can be prepared for consumption in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
